character_dossiers.name: the blind man
character_dossiers.biography: A blind man who lost his sight defending his country, England. He is described as a 'horrible, soft-spoken, eyeless creature' and interacts with the narrator at the Admiral Benbow inn.

character_dossiers.name: the blind beggar
character_dossiers.biography: A blind beggar who interacts with the narrator. Described as a 'horrible, soft-spoken, eyeless creature' and later leaves the room after interacting with the narrator.

character_dossiers.name: Bill
character_dossiers.biography: A sick old buccaneer referred to as the captain. He dies from apoplexy after receiving an object from the blind man.

character_dossiers.name: Doctor Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: A physician mentioned as someone the captain ordered to be sought for help.

character_dossiers.name: my mother
character_dossiers.biography: The narrator's mother, who is left unprotected after the captain's death and is involved in planning their escape.

character_dossiers.name: Black Dog
character_dossiers.biography: A shipmate of the captain, mentioned alongside the blind beggar as part of the crew.
